GB 19044一2022

Foreword

SAC/VTC 20 is in charge of this English translation. In case of any doubt about the contents of English

translation ,the Chinese original shall be considered authoritative.

This document is drafted in accordance with the rules given in the GB/T 1.1一2020 Directives for

standardization一Part 1:PRules for the structure and drafting of standardizing documents .

This document replaces the GB 19044一2013 Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and the

energy efficiency grades of selfballasted fiorescent Iamps for general lighting service ,GB 19043一

2013 Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and the energy efficiency grades of double-

capped fuorescent lamps for general lighting service ,GB 19415一2013 Minimum allowable values of

energy efficiency and evaluating values of energy conservation for single-capped fluorescent /amps ，,

GB 29144一2012 Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and the energy efficiency grades for

Sel丰ballasted electrodeless fluorescent lamps with general Jighting service , GB 29142一2012 Mimi-

mum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for single-capped electrode-

less fluorescent lamps in whole. In addition to structural adjustment and editorial changes, the fol-

lowing technical deviations have been made with respect to the GB 19044一2013,GB 19043一2013

GB 19415一2013,GB 29144一2012 and GB 29142一2012.

a) Added terms and definitions of“Iuminous efficacy of fluorescent lamps”and “minimum allowa-
ble value of energy efficiency for fluorescent lamps”(See Clause 3);

b) Deleted terms and definitions of“initial Iuminous efficacy for self-ballasted fluorescent lamps”，
“minimum allowable values of energy efficiency for self-ballasted fluorescent lamps”“evalua-
ting values of energy conservation for self-ballasted fluorescent lamps”，initial Iluminous effica-
cy for double-capped fluorescent lamps”“minimum allowable values of energy efficiency for
double-capped fluorescent lamps”, “evaluating values of energy conservation for double-capped
fluorescent lamps”，initial Iluminous efficacy for single-capped fluorescent lamps"…minimum al-
lowable values of energy efficiency for single-capped fluorescent lamps”, evaluating values of
energy conservation for single-capped fluorescent lamps”，initial Iluminous efficiency for self-
ballasted electrodeless fluorescent lamps”“minimum allowable values for self-ballasted elec-
trodeless fluorescent lamps”, “evaluating values of energy conservation for self-ballasted elec-
trodeless fluorescent lamps”，initial Iuminous efficacy for single-capped electrodeless fluores-
cent lamps" minimum allowable values of energy efficiency for single-capped electrodeless flu-
orescent lamps”,and“evaluating values of energy conservation for single-capped electrodeless
fluorescent lamps”(See Clause 3 of GB 19044一2013, Clause 3 of GB 19043一2013, Clause 3 of
GB 19415一2013,Clause 3 of GB 29144一2012, Clause 3 of GB 29142一2012) ;

c) Deleted“Basic requirements”(See 4.1 of GB 19044一2013, 4.1 of GB 19043一2013,.4.1 of

亚
